use_cases: Displaying spatial audio earbud product details with interactive left/right toggle
Showcasing product features with animated metric bars for latency and sync rate
Presenting product comparison views with distinct color-coded gradients
Highlighting connection status and battery levels for wireless audio devices
Creating immersive product pages for consumer electronics e-commerce
ai_summary: An interactive spatial product showcase component for displaying premium wireless earbuds with a toggleable left/right view, animated feature metrics, and gradient-based visual styling. The component uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and includes product stats like battery level and connection status. Designed for e-commerce product pages, tech product demos, and audio equipment showcases with a modern, gradient-forward aesthetic.
